summary: Iteration 22 - Security features testing complete. Fixed CRITICAL bug: Usuarios and Revendedores pages were crashing due to missing imports for ConfirmPasswordDialog and useSecureAction. All 17 backend security tests passed. Frontend ConfirmPasswordDialog flow verified working on Usuarios and Clientes pages.

issues: Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: ConfirmPasswordDialog is not defined - page was crashing
bugs_fixed.fix: Added missing imports for ConfirmPasswordDialog and useSecureAction, added useSecureAction hook call

bugs_fixed.issue: Same issue - ConfirmPasswordDialog and useSecureAction not imported
bugs_fixed.fix: Added missing imports and useSecureAction hook call

security_features_verified.rate_limiting: 10/minute on /api/auth/login and /api/portal/login - verified via slowapi decorator
security_features_verified.confirm_password_flow: Working - returns JWT confirm_token valid for 10 minutes
security_features_verified.delete_protection: All DELETE routes return 403 without X-Confirm-Token header

critical_code_review_comments: All security features implemented correctly in backend
ConfirmPasswordDialog component and useSecureAction hook are well-designed
Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security features fully tested and working. Fixed missing imports in Usuarios.jsx and Revendedores.jsx. All DELETE operations now require X-Confirm-Token header (returns 403 without it). Rate limiting active on login endpoints. Progressive lockout implemented for failed login attempts.
